TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: qalang Talah qaniy ga, wiwan puqing kki'an na ppraw ywaw na qqalang, Gokosyo, Hasisyo, Esesyo, Rayhyokay, Tosyokang, kwara qaniy ga, mwah praw mtiywaw llamu ywaw na qqalang. maki qutux minnanak na ngasal ay, Sskwan qqaya ki qqnxan na Tayal", cyux maki squ bih na ptlaman.Tehuk qu ryax hngawan ga, piyux balay squliq mwah mita ru mcisal sqaniy, minnanak ru llamu na qqaya ta kinbkisan cyux pkgun kya, iyat balay qinqiri na ywaw, wiwan lalu ki pinbahuw knluh ita qutux llyung na Mnibu qaniy.
S.PHON: qalaŇč talańß qanij …£a, wiwan puqiŇč kki Ēan na ppraw jwaw na qqalaŇč, …£okos~…ējo, ńßas~…ēis~…ējo, es~…ēes~…ējo, rajńßjokaj, tos~…ējokaŇč, kwara qanij …£a, mwańß praw mtijwaw llamu jwaw na qqalaŇč. maki qutux minnanak na Ňčas~…ēal aj, s~…ēs~…ēkwan qqaja ki qqnxan na tajal", ¶~ ®jux maki s~…ēqu ő≤ińß na ptlaman.teńßuk qu rjax ńßŇčawan …£a, pijux ő≤alaj s~…ēquliq mwańß mita ru m ¶~ ®is~…ēal s~…ēqanij, minnanak ru llamu na qqaja ta kinő≤kis~…ēan ¶~ ®jux pk…£un kja, ijat ő≤alaj qinqiri na jwaw, wiwan lalu ki pinő≤ańßuw knluńß ita qutux lljuŇč na mniő≤u qanij.
S.FORM: qalang Talah qaniy ga, wiwan puqing kki'an na ppraw ywaw na qqalang, Gokosyo, Hasisyo, Esesyo, Rayhyokay, Tosyokang, kwara qaniy ga, mwah praw mtiywaw llamu ywaw na qqalang. maki qutux minnanak na ngasal ay, Sskwan qqaya ki qqnxan na Tayal", cyux maki squ bih na ptlaman.Tehuk qu ryax hngawan ga, piyux balay squliq mwah mita ru mcisal sqaniy, minnanak ru llamu na qqaya ta kinbkisan cyux pkgun kya, iyat balay qinqiri na ywaw, wiwan lalu ki pinbahuw knluh ita qutux llyung na Mnibu qaniy.
